channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gun Control Groups Seek Transparency on Firearms Used in Tumbler Ridge Mass Shooting

item.description: In a recent interview with CNN, gubernatorial candidate and former U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services, Xavier Becerra, shared his perspectives on several pressing issues. Becerra discussed th...

item.title: Shakira to feature Uganda’s Ghetto Kids in 2026 World Cup halftime show
item.description: Shakira, the famous Colombian singer, has announced that Uganda’s popular dance group, Ghetto Kids, will join her for the halftime performance at the 2026 World Cup final. She revealed the news via In...

item.title: WA Premier Sparks Debate Over Kimberley Gas and Energy Security
item.description: Western Australian Premier Roger Cook has stirred debate after suggesting that fracking in the Kimberley could become necessary if Woodside’s Browse gas project does not proceed. He cited forecasts of...

item.title: Stars Perform at Cannes' amfAR Gala in Support of AIDS Research
item.description: The annual amfAR Gala, part of the Cannes Film Festival, took place on the French Riviera in Antibes, offering a glamorous evening of charity, performances, and auctions to support AIDS research. Atte...

item.title: US Temporarily Suspends Arms Sales to Taiwan Amid Rising Tensions in Iran
item.description: A top official from the United States Navy has confirmed that arms sales to Taiwan have been temporarily put on hold due to the ongoing conflict involving Iran. This pause is reportedly a precautionar...

item.title: How Nigeria’s PAYE Tax Structure Affects State Development And Stakeholders
item.description: This article yan about how Nigeria dey struggle with the current PAYE tax system and how e dey affect development across different states. Lagos State don show say e be like small country because of t...

item.title: Early Life and Musical Journey of Annie Lennox
item.description: Annie Lennox, born on December 25, 1954, in Torry, Aberdeen, Scotland, is renowned as a Scottish singer-songwriter, activist, and philanthropist. She began exploring her artistic abilities at Aberdeen...

item.title: Overview of the Upcoming Film 'Tayo Sa Wakas'
item.description: ABS-CBN, one of the Philippines’ leading media and entertainment companies, has shared details about its upcoming film 'Tayo Sa Wakas'. The movie is a Star Cinema production and features popular young...

item.title: Félicien Kabuga, Key Figure in 1994 Rwanda Genocide, Dies in The Hague Before Trial
item.description: Félicien Kabuga, who was one of the last major fugitives wanted for his role in the 1994 Rwanda genocide, has passed away while in detention in The Hague, Netherlands. Kabuga, who was in his late eigh...

item.title: A Glimpse into Teenage Sharon Tate’s Life in the 1950s

item.title: AI Helps Improve Disaster Response in Eastern Mediterranean Countries
